Authenticate.summary: Authenticates with the WEB4 OASIS API and returns a JWT token for subsequent requests.

GetCurrentAvatar.summary: Gets the current authenticated avatar with XP and active quest/objective (for STAR client refresh). Delegates to WEB4 get-logged-in-avatar-with-xp so response includes AvatarDetail.XP, ActiveQuestId, ActiveObjectiveId.

SetActiveQuest.summary: Sets the active quest and objective for the logged-in avatar (tracker state). Persisted on AvatarDetail; restored after beam-in. Forwards to WEB4.

GetInventory.summary: Gets all inventory items owned by the authenticated avatar. This is the avatar's actual inventory (items they own), not items they created. Inventory is shared across all games, apps, websites, and services. Delegates to WEB4 OASIS API.

AddItemToInventory.summary: Adds an item to the avatar's inventory. Accepts InventoryItem object directly (ASP.NET Core automatically deserializes JSON). Delegates to WEB4 OASIS API.

RemoveItemFromInventory.summary: Removes an item from the avatar's inventory. Delegates to WEB4 OASIS API.

HasItem.summary: Checks if the avatar has a specific item in their inventory. Delegates to WEB4 OASIS API.

HasItemByName.summary: Checks if the avatar has a specific item by name in their inventory. Delegates to WEB4 OASIS API.

SearchInventory.summary: Searches the avatar's inventory by name or description. Delegates to WEB4 OASIS API.

GetInventoryItem.summary: Gets a specific item from the avatar's inventory by ID. Delegates to WEB4 OASIS API.

AddXp.summary: Add experience points to the authenticated avatar (e.g. from game actions like killing monsters). Amount 0 is allowed (returns current XP without change; used to refresh cache after beam-in). Forwards to WEB4 OASIS API.

SendItemToAvatar.summary: Sends an item from the authenticated avatar's inventory to another avatar. Target is the recipient's username or avatar Id. Forwards to WEB4 OASIS API.

SendItemToClan.summary: Sends an item from the authenticated avatar's inventory to a clan. Target is the clan name. Forwards to WEB4 OASIS API.

GetAllIQuests.summary: Retrieves all quests in the system.

GetAllQuestsForAvatar.summary: Retrieves all quests for the current avatar (no status filter). Returns a flat list of every quest where CreatedByAvatarId matches and Active=1: top-level quests, sub-quests, and objectives (child quests with ParentQuestId set). Use this for the quest popup; the client filters by status (Not Started, In Progress, Completed) and by ParentQuestId for sub-quests/objectives.

GetAllQuestsForAvatarGame.summary: Same data path as <see cref="GetAllQuestsForAvatar"/> but returns a flat game-friendly DTO (no full holon graph / STARNET children). Use for native clients and games; keep <c>all-for-avatar</c> for tools and graph consumers.

GetIQuest.summary: Retrieves a specific quest by its unique identifier.

CreateIQuest.summary: Creates a new quest for the authenticated avatar.

UpdateIQuest.summary: Updates an existing quest by its unique identifier.

DeleteIQuest.summary: Deletes a quest by its unique identifier.

GetIQuestsByAvatar.summary: Retrieves all quests for a specific avatar.

CloneQuest.summary: Clones an existing quest with a new name.

GetQuestsByType.summary: Retrieves quests by a specific type.

GetQuestsByStatusGame.summary: Same filtering as <see cref="GetQuestsByStatus"/> but returns <see cref="GameQuestSummaryLite"/> rows for small payloads in games.

SearchQuests.summary: Searches quests by name or description.

CreateQuestWithOptions.summary: Creates a new quest with specified parameters.

AddQuestObjective.summary: Adds an objective (sub-quest) to an existing quest.

RemoveQuestObjective.summary: Removes an objective (sub-quest) from a quest.

AddSubQuest.summary: Adds a sub-quest (full child quest) to an existing quest. Use for nested quests that can have their own objectives; use POST objectives for checklist items.

RemoveSubQuest.summary: Removes a sub-quest (child quest) from a quest.

LoadQuest.summary: Loads a quest by ID with optional version and holon type.

LoadQuestFromPath.summary: Loads a quest from source or installed folder path.

LoadQuestFromPublished.summary: Loads a quest from a published file.

LoadAllQuestsForAvatar.summary: Loads all quests for the authenticated avatar.

PublishQuest.summary: Publishes a quest to the STARNET system.

DownloadQuest.summary: Downloads a quest from the STARNET system.

GetQuestVersions.summary: Gets all versions of a specific quest.

LoadQuestVersion.summary: Loads a specific version of a quest.

EditQuest.summary: Edits a quest with new DNA configuration.

UnpublishQuest.summary: Unpublishes a quest from the STARNET system.

RepublishQuest.summary: Republishes a quest to the STARNET system.

CanStartQuest.summary: Checks whether the authenticated avatar can start the quest (quest is NotStarted and prerequisites are met). Use for the quest popup to enable/disable the Start button. Returns Result=true when the quest can be started, false otherwise with Message explaining why.

ApplyQuestProgress.summary: Apply in-game progress (monster kills, XP, item pickups, keys, level elapsed seconds) to the tracked quest. Updates objective progress and % complete; completes objectives/quest when thresholds are met.</summary>

ResetObjectiveProgress.summary: Clears all progress dictionaries on the quest and its embedded objectives (kills, collected counts, XP, etc.) to 0; leaves Need* requirements unchanged. If the quest was Completed, status becomes InProgress.</summary>

CompleteQuestObjectiveByIdentifiers.summary: Complete a quest objective using string identifiers in the JSON body (GUIDs or client slugs such as cross_dimensional_keycard_hunt / doom_red_keycard). Native games use this path; route parameters remain Guid-only.</summary>

CompleteQuest.summary: Completes a quest for the authenticated avatar.

GetQuestLeaderboard.summary: Gets quest leaderboard for a specific quest.

GetQuestRewards.summary: Gets quest rewards for a specific quest.

GetQuestStats.summary: Gets quest statistics for the authenticated avatar.

GetAllRuntimes.summary: Retrieves all runtimes in the system.

GetRuntime.summary: Retrieves a specific runtime by its unique identifier.

CreateRuntime.summary: Creates a new runtime for the authenticated avatar.

CreateRuntimeWithOptions.summary: Creates a new runtime with specified parameters.

LoadRuntimeFromPath.summary: Loads a runtime from the specified path.

LoadRuntimeFromPublished.summary: Loads a runtime from published sources.

LoadAllRuntimesForAvatar.summary: Loads all runtimes for the current avatar.

PublishRuntime.summary: Publishes a runtime to the STARNET system with optional cloud upload.

DownloadRuntime.summary: Downloads a runtime from the STARNET system.

GetRuntimeVersions.summary: Gets all versions of a runtime.

LoadRuntimeVersion.summary: Loads a specific version of a runtime.

EditRuntime.summary: Edits a runtime with the provided changes.

UnpublishRuntime.summary: Unpublishes a runtime from the STARNET system.

RepublishRuntime.summary: Republishes a runtime to the STARNET system.

ActivateRuntime.summary: Activates a runtime in the STARNET system.

DeactivateRuntime.summary: Deactivates a runtime in the STARNET system.

GetStatus.summary: Retrieves the current status of the STAR system.

IgniteSTAR.summary: Ignites (starts) the STAR system with optional authentication credentials.

BeamIn.summary: Beams in (authenticates) an avatar to the STAR system.

GetAllTemplates.summary: Templates management endpoints for creating, updating, and managing STAR templates. Templates represent reusable code patterns, configurations, and project structures within the STAR ecosystem.

GetTemplate.summary: Retrieves a specific template by its unique identifier.

CreateTemplate.summary: Creates a new template for the authenticated avatar.

CreateTemplateWithOptions.summary: Creates a new template with specified parameters.

LoadTemplateFromPath.summary: Loads a template from the specified path.

LoadTemplateFromPublished.summary: Loads a template from published sources.

LoadAllTemplatesForAvatar.summary: Loads all templates for the current avatar.

PublishTemplate.summary: Publishes a template to the STARNET system with optional cloud upload.

DownloadTemplate.summary: Downloads a template from the STARNET system.

GetTemplateVersions.summary: Gets all versions of a template.

LoadTemplateVersion.summary: Loads a specific version of a template.

EditTemplate.summary: Edits a template with the provided changes.

UnpublishTemplate.summary: Unpublishes a template from the STARNET system.

RepublishTemplate.summary: Republishes a template to the STARNET system.

ActivateTemplate.summary: Activates a template in the STARNET system.

DeactivateTemplate.summary: Deactivates a template in the STARNET system.

GetAllZomes.summary: Retrieves all zomes in the system.

GetZome.summary: Retrieves a specific zome by its unique identifier.

CreateZome.summary: Creates a new zome for the authenticated avatar.

CreateZomeWithOptions.summary: Creates a new zome with specified parameters.

LoadZome.summary: Loads a zome by ID with optional version and holon type.

LoadZomeFromPath.summary: Loads a zome from source or installed folder path.

LoadZomeFromPublished.summary: Loads a zome from a published file.

LoadAllZomesForAvatar.summary: Loads all zomes for the authenticated avatar.

SearchZomes.summary: Searches for zomes by name or description.

PublishZome.summary: Publishes a zome to the STARNET system.

DownloadZome.summary: Downloads a zome from the STARNET system.

GetZomeVersions.summary: Gets all versions of a specific zome.

LoadZomeVersion.summary: Loads a specific version of a zome.

EditZome.summary: Edits a zome with new DNA configuration.

UnpublishZome.summary: Unpublishes a zome from the STARNET system.

RepublishZome.summary: Republishes a zome to the STARNET system.

GetAllZomesMetaData.summary: Retrieves all Zomes Metadata in the system.

GetZomeMetaData.summary: Retrieves a specific Zome Metadata by its unique identifier.

CreateZomeMetaData.summary: Creates a new Zome Metadata for the authenticated avatar.

PublishZomeMetaData.summary: Publishes a Zome Metadata to the STARNET.

SearchZomesMetaData.summary: Searches for Zomes Metadata using advanced search criteria.

GetZomeMetaDataVersions.summary: Retrieves all versions of a specific Zome Metadata.

CreateZomeMetaDataWithOptions.summary: Creates a new Zome Metadata with advanced options.

LoadZomeMetaDataFromPath.summary: Loads a Zome Metadata from a file path.

LoadZomeMetaDataFromPublished.summary: Loads a Zome Metadata from a published file.

LoadAllZomeMetaDataForAvatar.summary: Loads all Zomes Metadata for the current avatar.

LoadZomeMetaDataVersion.summary: Loads a specific version of a Zome Metadata.
